list4.Beneficent: doing or producing good; especially : performing acts of kindness and charity
list4.Malignant: tending to produce death or deterioration; especially : tending to infiltrate, metastasize, and terminate fatally
list4.Subsidized: furnished with a subsidy : paid for with the assistance of a subsidy (such as a grant of public or private money)
list4.Languished: to be or become feeble, weak, or enervated
list4.Salient: standing out conspicuously : prominent; especially : of notable significance
list4.Altruistic: relating to or given to altruism:
list4.Artful: performed with or showing art or skill
list4.Meteoric: of or relating to a meteor
